//: Copy this file to .vscode/tasks.json at your workspace root to enable
the 'Flow: Compile current file' build task.
Cmd+Shift+B  -> runs flowc against the active .flow file.
Errors appear in the Problems panel and as squiggles
in the editor, parsed by the $flowc matcher
Install the 'Trigger Task on Save' extension (Gruntfuggly.triggertaskonsave)
The default assumes the workspace root contains a flowc/ subdirectory
with a built flowc binary. Edit 'command' if your flowc lives elsewhere
(e.g. 'flowc' if it's on your PATH after make install).
